actions.expression:
SELECT rtspurchaseorder.sid,
       rtspurchaseorder.DeliveryDate,
       rtspurchaseorder.OrderDate,
       rtspurchaseorder.fktt,
       rtspurchaseorder.cwgc,
       rtspurchaseorder.SupplierNo,
       rtspurchaseorder.SupplierName,
       rtspurchaseorder.rxr,
       rtspurchaseorder.rxfs,
       rtspurchaseorder.sjhm,
       rtspurchaseorder.SupplierBank,
       rtspurchaseorder.SupplierAccountSerialID,
       rtspurchaseorder.shui,
       rtspurchaseorder.sfsh
FROM rtspurchaseorder 
WHERE (rtspurchaseorder.PurchaseOrderNo=[付款审批.RTS采购单号]) 
ORDER BY rtspurchaseorder.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT gchk.sid,
       gchk.wstt,
       gchk.chrq,
       gchk.sfzk,
       gchk.gcmc,
       gchk.customer,
       gchk.wxfp,
       gchk.bzsm,
       gchk.fpje,
       gchk.fpwk,
       gchk.fkhj,
       gchk.yfhj,
       gchk.gcmc1,
       gchk.zkje,
       gchk.cxbg,
       gchk.kpxh,
       gchk.sb,
       gchk.dlrq,
       gchk.cght
FROM gchk 
WHERE (gchk.jsrm=:jsrm) 
  AND (gchk.wstt like "%"+ :wstt +"%") 
  AND (gchk.sfjq<>"是") 
  AND (gchk.fpwk<>"是") 
  AND ((gchk.gcmc1 like "%"+ :gcmc1 +"%") 
  AND (gchk.gcmc=:gcmc)) 
  AND (((gchk.chrq<=[付款审批.出货日期]) 
  AND (gchk.chrq<>"")) 
  OR (gchk.bzsm like "%承兑%")) 
ORDER BY sfzk desc

actions.expression:
SELECT ydhk.sid,
       ydhk.wstt,
       ydhk.chrq,
       ydhk.sfzk,
       ydhk.gcmc,
       ydhk.customer,
       ydhk.wxfp,
       ydhk.bzsm,
       ydhk.fpje,
       ydhk.fpwk,
       ydhk.fkhj,
       ydhk.yfhj,
       ydhk.gcmc1,
       ydhk.zkje,
       ydhk.cxbg,
       ydhk.kpxh,
       ydhk.sb,
       ydhk.dlrq,
       fkspsheet4.fphm
FROM ydhk 
LEFT 
JOIN fkspsheet4 
  ON (ydhk.sb=fkspsheet4.sb) 
WHERE (ydhk.jsrm=:jsrm) 
  AND (ydhk.wstt like "%"+ :wstt +"%") 
  AND (ydhk.sfjq<>"是") 
  AND (ydhk.fpwk<>"是") 
  AND ((ydhk.gcmc1 like "%"+ :gcmc1 +"%") 
  OR (ydhk.gcmc=:gcmc)) 
  AND (((ydhk.chrq<=[付款审批.出货日期]) 
  AND (ydhk.chrq<>"")) 
  OR (ydhk.bzsm like "%承兑%")) 
ORDER BY sfzk desc

actions.expression:
SELECT gchk.sid,
       gchk.wstt,
       gchk.chrq,
       gchk.sfzk,
       gchk.gcmc,
       gchk.customer,
       gchk.wxfp,
       gchk.bzsm,
       gchk.fpje,
       gchk.fpwk,
       gchk.fkhj,
       gchk.yfhj,
       gchk.gcmc1,
       gchk.zkje,
       gchk.cxbg,
       gchk.kpxh,
       gchk.sb,
       gchk.dlrq,
       gchk.cght
FROM gchk 
WHERE (gchk.jsrm=:jsrm) 
  AND (gchk.sfjq<>"是") 
  AND (gchk.fpwk="是") 
  AND ((gchk.gcmc1=:gcmc1)) 
  AND (((gchk.chrq<=[付款审批.出货日期]) 
  AND (gchk.chrq<>"")) 
  OR (gchk.bzsm like "%承兑%")) 
ORDER BY sfzk desc

actions.expression:
SELECT rtspurchaseorder.sid,
       rtspurchaseorder.SupplierNo,
       rtspurchaseorder.SupplierName,
       rtspurchaseorder.sfkp,
       rtspurchaseorder.fktt,
       rtspurchaseorder.cwgc,
       rtspurchaseorder.rxfs,
       rtspurchaseorder.SupplierBank,
       rtspurchaseorder.SupplierAccountSerialID,
       rtspurchaseorder.TotalPurchaseAmount,
       rtspurchaseorder.DeliveryDate,
       rtspurchaseorder.PurchaseCurrency,
       rtspurchaseorder.OrderDate,
       rtspurchaseorder.shui,
       rtspurchaseorder.hklx,
       rtspurchaseorder.fkxs,
       rtspurchaseorder.sfsh,
       rtspurchaseorder.OrderRemark,
       rtspurchaseorder.PurchaseOrderNo
FROM rtspurchaseorder 
WHERE (rtspurchaseorder.PurchaseOrderNo=[付款审批.RTS采购单号]) 
ORDER BY rtspurchaseorder.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-提前货值
actions.caption: 计算-提前货值
actions.expression: [付款审批.产品资料.总 金 额]

actions.name: 计算-正常总额
actions.caption: 计算-正常总额
actions.expression: [付款审批.正常付款详情.审请金额]

actions.name: 计算-可分配金额
actions.caption: 计算-可分配金额
actions.expression: [付款审批.审请金额]-[付款审批.预付合计]
actions.output: 付款审批.付款分配.可分配金额

actions.name: 计算-付款分配-折扣费用
actions.caption: 计算-付款分配-折扣费用
actions.expression: [付款审批.付款分配.总 金 额]*[付款审批.付款分配.折扣点数]/100
actions.output: 付款审批.付款分配.折扣费用

actions.name: 计算-折扣费用1
actions.caption: 计算-折扣费用1
actions.expression: [付款审批.付款分配.总 金 额]*[付款审批.付款分配.折扣点数]/100
actions.output: 付款审批.付款分配.折扣费用1

actions.name: 计算-优惠金额
actions.caption: 计算-优惠金额
actions.expression: [付款审批.产品资料.总 金 额]*[付款审批.产品资料.优惠点]/100
actions.output: 付款审批.产品资料.优惠金额

actions.name: 计算-折扣费用
actions.caption: 计算-折扣费用
actions.expression: [付款审批.付款分配.总 金 额]*[付款审批.付款分配.折扣点数]/100

actions.name: 调入付款类型

fields.output: 付款审批.付款类型
fields.caption: 付款类型

actions.expression:
select rid,mc,wb1 
from zx 
where (ly='货款类型') 
and (mc=[付款审批.货款类型])
actions.caption: 调入付款类型

view.params:
SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

是
否

SELECT DISTINCT(cght.wxht)
FROM cght  where (cght.sccj1=:sccj1)

SELECT DISTINCT(bgmxd.fphm)
FROM bgmxd,bgmxdsheet
WHERE   (bgmxd.rid=bgmxdsheet.PID) and (bgmxd.bggs like "%"+ :bggs  +"%")
   AND  (bgmxdsheet.gcmc=:gcmc)

SELECT DISTINCT(fksp.khh)
FROM fksp
WHERE   (fksp.cwgc=[付款审批.财务工厂]) and (csmc=[付款审批.厂商名称])

SELECT DISTINCT(fksp.yhzh)
FROM fksp
WHERE   (fksp.cwgc=[付款审批.财务工厂]) and (csmc=[付款审批.厂商名称])
   AND  (fksp.khh=[付款审批.开户银行])

SELECT zx.mc
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="货款类型")
ORDER BY zx.SID ASC

FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="付款形式")
